song.title: Lord of the Dance
song.author: Sidney Carter
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G Em Bm Em “I danced in the morning when the world just begun, . Am D Am D7 I danced in the moon and the stars and thesun. . G Em Bm Em I came down from heaven and I danced on the earth, . Am D7 G C G At Bethlehem I had my birth.”
[C] .G Bm Em Dance, then, wherever you may be, .Bm Am7 D7 “I am the Lord of the dance,” said He. . G Em Bm “And I'll lead you all wherever you may be, . Am7 D7 G C G I'll lead you all in the dance,” said He.
[V2] “I danced for the scribes and the Pharisees, They wouldn't dance and they wouldn't follow Me. I danced for the fishermen James and John, They came with Me and the dance went on.”
[V3] “I danced on the Sabbath and I healed the lame, The holy people said that it was a shame. They whipped Me and they stripped Me and they hung Me high, They left Me there on the cross to die.”
[V4] “I danced on the Friday when the sky turned black, It's hard to dance when the Devil’s on your back. They buried My body and they thought I was gone, But I am the dance and I still go on.”
[V5] “They cut Me down and I leaped up high, I am the life that will never, never die. I'll live in you all if you'll live in Me, I am the Lord of the dance,” said He.
